raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "One in three people who give birth will experience pelvic floor disorder in their lifetime.",
    "Most postpartum check-ups currently focus on a urine exam, mental health, and a brief pelvic examination, but fail to address anatomical changes in the pelvic floor.",
    "Failing to address anatomical changes in the pelvic floor can lead to urinary continence, pelvic organ prolapse, and low back pain.",
    "Scripps Health in San Diego is one of the few healthcare systems currently providing pelvic floor and core conditioning physical therapy.",
    "AB 2756 will make pelvic floor physical therapy the standard for birthing Californians in the future."
  ]
}
```
